annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen enumeration and metadata (geometry, scale, refresh). Notifications when screens are added, removed, or geometry changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the list of effective screen identifiers (EDID-based physical IDs like Dell:U2722D:115107, or virtual screen IDs like Dell:U2722D:115107/vs:0 when subdivided).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of effective screen identifiers.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return detailed info for a screen as JSON (geometry, scale, refresh rate, etc.).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen identifier (EDID-based like Dell:U2722D:115107, or virtual like Dell:U2722D:115107/vs:0).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen info as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the stable EDID-based screen identifier for a connector name. Format: manufacturer:model:serial (or connector name fallback for virtual displays).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Connector name (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Stable EDID-based screen identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the EDID-based identifier of the primary screen. Prefers KWin output order over QGuiApplication::primaryScreen().

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Primary screen identifier (e.g. Dell:U2722D:115107).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Override the primary screen with the KWin compositor's output order primary. Called by the KWin effect on daemon ready.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Connector name from Workspace::outputOrder().first() (e.g. DP-1). Resolved to EDID-based identifier internally.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a new screen is connected. For subdivided screens, emits once per virtual screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Effective screen identifier (e.g. Dell:U2722D:115107 or Dell:U2722D:115107/vs:0).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a screen is disconnected. For subdivided screens, emits once per virtual screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Effective screen identifier (e.g. Dell:U2722D:115107 or Dell:U2722D:115107/vs:0).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a screen's resolution or position changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Effective screen identifier whose geometry changed.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the virtual screen subdivision configuration for a physical screen as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Stable EDID-based physical screen identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Virtual screen config as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set the virtual screen subdivision configuration for a physical screen from JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Stable EDID-based physical screen identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Virtual screen config as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the list of physical screen identifiers (stable EDID-based IDs).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of physical screen identifiers.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all effective screen IDs. For subdivided physical screens, returns virtual screen IDs; otherwise returns the physical screen ID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of effective screen identifiers.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the effective screen ID (virtual or physical) containing the given global coordinates.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Global X coordinate.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Global Y coordinate.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Effective screen ID at the given point, or empty if none.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when virtual screen subdivisions change for a physical screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Physical screen whose virtual screen configuration changed.
